THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOOSHOOLOV, DENISE MOOSHOOLOV, SHANI MUNOZ, LASANDRA "LISA" THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3434 TARAVAL STREET $1,300.00 RENT, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,480.00, STAYED UNTIL AUG-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE STIPULATION FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
